name: Desperado
descs:
This E.G.O Gift's effects are enhanced based on the number of Identities in the Team loadout with Attack Skills that gain or spend [Bullet] (except E.G.O Skills; counts all units in the Team)

- At 2+...
On Use with a Skill that gains or spends [Bullet]: Gain 2 [Agility] and 4 [AttackUp] next turn (once per Identity per turn)

- At 5+...
Skills used by Identities that gain or spend [Bullet]: Clash Power +1, deal +10% damage
Skills that gain or spend [Bullet]: Deal +(100 / # of Coins)% damage
If an affected unit is out of [Bullet], gain 4 [Bullet] at the next Turn Start (once per Identity per Encounter)

- At 8+...
Turn Start: Apply 1 [DesperadoBuff] to Identities that gain or spend [Bullet]
• If the affected unit did not spend [Bullet] last turn, apply 1 additional [DesperadoBuff]
Combat End: deal (total sum of [DesperadoBuff] on all allies x 3) Pierce damage to 1 random enemy (max 30)
• Then, repeat the above effect (number of Identities in the Team that gain or spend [Bullet] - 1) times
